creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
After re-reading the comments and hearing no more support for the issue, i will close the PR as "Works As Intended".

The functional configuration is a feature and not a bug. Changing or removing it without beeing restored by pkg update is very easy - just truncate the file.

Also its good practice to provide a basic working configuration.

Without any other arguments everything works like it is intended to work.
